context: Tests whether the agent correctly manages cart state using Commerce.js APIs, uses a single module-level client instance, passes variant selections in the correct format, uses the right cart API methods, and accesses the correct cart property for item count.

checklist.name: Single Commerce instance
checklist.description: The Commerce client is created exactly once, at module level (not inside useEffect, component functions, or event handlers)

checklist.name: cart.retrieve() on mount
checklist.description: Calls `commerce.cart.retrieve()` to get or create the cart (e.g. in useEffect or on initialization)

checklist.name: cart.add() with variant selections
checklist.description: Calls `commerce.cart.add(productId, quantity, selections)` where `selections` is an object mapping variant group IDs to option IDs (third argument)

checklist.name: cart.update() for quantity
checklist.description: Calls `commerce.cart.update(lineItemId, {quantity: N})` to update a line item's quantity

checklist.name: cart.remove() for line items
checklist.description: Calls `commerce.cart.remove(lineItemId)` to remove a specific item from the cart

checklist.name: cart.empty() to clear cart
checklist.description: Calls `commerce.cart.empty()` to empty/clear the entire cart

checklist.name: React Context pattern
checklist.description: Uses React's createContext and a Provider component to share cart state across the component tree

checklist.name: useCart hook exported
checklist.description: Exports a `useCart` hook (or equivalent) that returns cart state and cart action functions

checklist.name: total_unique_items for badge
checklist.description: Uses `cart.total_unique_items` (not `cart.total_items` or a manual count) for the cart item count display

checklist.name: Variant group ID as key
checklist.description: When building the variant selections object, uses the variant group ID as the key and option ID as the value (not option name or group name)

checklist.name: Public key for client
checklist.description: The Commerce client is initialized with the public API key (an environment variable), not the secret key
